babyDevelopment: Reflexes are developing. Fingers and toes separate and claws/nails start to grow. The digestive system is contracting.
bodyChanges: Your uterus rises out of the pelvis, easing pressure on the bladder. Miscarriage risk drops significantly.
tips: Celebrate the end of the first trimester!

do: Announce your pregnancy if you wish
dont: Expose yourself to sick people needlessly

travelAdvisory.note: Perfect time to plan a Babymoon for the second trimester!

milestoneDescription: Congratulations! You've made it through the most critical developmental stage.
